agent_prompt_describing_data_to_extract: Agent prompt describing data to extract
block_ads_and_popups_during_parsing: Block ads and popups during parsing
crawl_an_entire_site_or_section_with_fir: Crawl an entire site or section with Firecrawl and return the page content for indexing or analysis.
describe_the_data_structure_you_want_to_: Describe the data structure you want to extract...
describe_what_data_to_extract_e_g_extrac: Describe what data to extract (e.g., "Extract product names, prices, and descriptions")
describe_what_data_to_find_and_extract_e: Describe what data to find and extract (e.g., "Find the founders of Firecrawl and their backgrounds")
document_input_file_upload_or_file_refer: Document input (file upload or file reference)
generated_summary_of_the_parsed_document: Generated summary of the parsed document
html_tags_to_exclude_during_parsing: HTML tags to exclude during parsing
html_tags_to_include_during_parsing: HTML tags to include during parsing
integrate_firecrawl_into_the_workflow_sc: Integrate Firecrawl into the workflow. Scrape pages, search the web, crawl entire sites, map URL structures, and extract structured data with AI.
limit_agent_to_provided_urls_only: Limit agent to provided URLs only
must_be_object_for_a_valid_json_schema: Must be "object" for a valid JSON Schema
optional_urls_to_focus_the_agent_on: Optional URLs to focus the agent on
pull_structured_fields_from_one_or_more_: Pull structured fields from one or more URLs using Firecrawl Extract with a prompt or schema.
remove_base64_images_keep_alt_text: Remove base64 images, keep alt text
run_a_web_search_with_firecrawl_then_scr: Run a web search with Firecrawl, then scrape the top results into a cited research brief.
scrape_a_single_url_with_firecrawl_and_r: Scrape a single URL with Firecrawl and return clean main-content markdown for an agent to read.
scrape_search_crawl_map_and_extract_web_: Scrape, search, crawl, map, and extract web data
unprocessed_raw_html_from_the_parsed_doc: Unprocessed raw HTML from the parsed document
upload_a_document_pdf_docx_html_xlsx_etc: Upload a document (PDF, DOCX, HTML, XLSX, etc.)
wait_time_before_scraping_in_ms: Wait time before scraping in ms
